title: Kaworu Expies
wikitext:
[]: Kaworu Expies             Quote Post by Someone » Sat May 07, 2011 7:26 am I fear that nobody here played The World Ends With You... (its the best DS game ever made) But a certain character from it STRONGLY reminds me of Kaworu. Picture: While he is not an "angel" in the game, he is in contact with some. Of course the angels from that game are different from the ones in NGE. Could Joshua be based of Kaworu? Oh, he has a jesus beam too.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Sat May 07, 2011 7:32 am Well, considering how influential EVA was in Japan, having expies of EVA characters is to be expected. Hell, even I made a character based on Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by Cody MacArthur Fett » Sat May 07, 2011 8:02 am Kaworu? As Joshua? I don't see how in the world you can possibly mistake the successor of Moses for . . . Oh! Video game Joshua, that makes much more sense. Shogo-Kun wrote: Well, considering how influential EVA was in Japan, having expies of EVA characters is to be expected. Hell, even I made a character based on Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat May 07, 2011 8:31 am Well, the picture looks EXACTLY like Kaworu with slightly longer hair... His expies really ARE everywhere, tough. I even admit having produced one myself. XD He's called William Michaelis, but isn't really that supernatural or angelic - He is an artificial human, but there are five of those in that particular work, four of which are relevant main characters. Expies of the EVa cast are very prominent, Rei and Shinji copies are also all over the place - then again, the EVA characters were half-based on previously existing stereotypes, so perhaps it's more accurate to say that EVA has influences/tweaked/ impacted those already existing stereotypes so that they post-EVA use will either resemble EVA or remind people of it. EVa sorta changed the rules - it is as widely known in Japan as Star wars/Star Trek in the US or Doctor Who in Britain, as far as I know.

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Sat May 07, 2011 9:55 am Never expected a reference in an awesome game like this.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sat May 07, 2011 5:24 pm Kaworu's personality also strikes me as similar to Joshua's. Both are quite laid-back and speak in calm, soothing voices. They both also serve to mentally support their respective series main characters (Well, Shinji more so than Neku, but still...), so I would say Kaworu is similar to Joshua.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Sat May 07, 2011 10:11 pm Yawn* Trust me, there are DOZENS of Kaworu clones out there.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Sun May 08, 2011 1:33 pm Probably.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Mon May 09, 2011 12:44 pm Behold, my friend, the art of the Expy . Evangelion has spawned legions of them . (TV Tropes is fun!!) On a semi-unrelated note, am I the only human being on the planet who hated The World Ends With You ?

[]:             Quote Post by Number 44 » Mon May 09, 2011 2:34 pm Hmmmm. Should we have a topic to list Eva rip off characters in? Update: An idea starts to form...

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Mon May 09, 2011 7:18 pm The thread would probably be at least twenty pages.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Mon May 09, 2011 7:23 pm Lets begin! I propose Orochimaru from Naruto.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 09, 2011 7:33 pm That guy in Mai-Hime. If you've seen Mai-Hime, you know the one. They wanted him to be Kaworu so bad, they got Akira Ishida to do the voice. EDIT: Ah, here he is . I'm surprised I managed to forget his name, considering they went for something as obvious as Nagi Homura. (...Get it?)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon May 09, 2011 7:46 pm Reichu wrote: That guy in Mai-Hime. If you've seen Mai-Hime, you know the one. They wanted him to be Kaworu so bad, they got Akira Ishida to do the voice.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 09, 2011 7:48 pm I wonder how many times Ishida-san has contemplated suicide for having one of the most type-cast careers in international acting history.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon May 09, 2011 8:21 pm You can just go through the char-list here: http://myanimelist.net/clubs.php?cid=17403

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 09, 2011 8:31 pm Can a white-haired bishounen list that's missing Kaworu Nagisa be trusted?

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Mon May 09, 2011 8:37 pm @Reichu: No. No it cannot. @Topic: You could add Itsuki Koizumi from Haruhi Suzumiya to the list of Kaworu expies.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon May 09, 2011 8:41 pm Shogo-Kun wrote: @Topic: You could add Itsuki Koizumi from Haruhi Suzumiya to the list of Kaworu expies.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Mon May 09, 2011 10:06 pm N from Pokemon reminds me a lot of Kaworu. Maybe that's just me.
